Package org.apache.juneau.commons.settings

Interface FunctionalPropertySource

All Superinterfaces:
PropertySource
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface FunctionalPropertySource extends PropertySource
A functional interface for creating read-only PropertySource instances from a function.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PropertyLookupResult
    get(String name)
    Returns a property in this property source.
    static FunctionalPropertySource
    of(UnaryOperator<String> function)
    Creates a functional source from a function that returns a string.

  • Method Details

    • get

      PropertyLookupResult get(String name)
      Description copied from interface: PropertySource
      Returns a property in this property source.
      Specified by:
      get in interface PropertySource
      Parameters:
      name - The property name.
      Returns:
      The property lookup result:
      • PropertyLookupResult.missing() if this source does not define the key.
      • PropertyLookupResult.present(Optional) with Optional.empty() if the key exists with a null value.
      • PropertyLookupResult.present(Optional) with a value if the key exists with a non-null value.

    • of

      static FunctionalPropertySource of(UnaryOperator<String> function)
      Creates a functional source from a function that returns a string.
      Parameters:
      function - The function to delegate property lookups to. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      A new functional property source instance.
